name: Chat Orchestrator
description: Turn ambiguous chat requests into crisp execution moves, structured replies, routing decisions, and next-step orchestration.
not_for: deep specialist domain execution that another skill should own
long-form content writing as the primary deliverable
project-management system design beyond chat orchestration
stalling execution with unnecessary clarifying questions
typical_inputs: conversation history or messy thread context
constraints on tone, brevity, and timing
known facts, open questions, and blockers
available specialists, tools, or handoff options
typical_outputs: conversation summary with decisions and blockers
